title: Nasir's Mobs Plus
description: Adds more mobs based on the biome! and maybe some more evil ones...
body:
Adds some new mobs into the game that are biome specific. Some provide useful loot, some are... mysterious.

## Type of Mobs
- Wanderers (10 different variants, including a wandering merchant.)
- Trojan (A large cow, perhaps more then it seems...)
- Mummy (Desert husks but stronger, afflicts nearby players with slowness. Might have good loot.)
- Cactus (Be careful when mining cactus.)
- Basalt Delta Blazes (Blazes now spawn in the basalt delta as well!)
- Piglin Giants (Large hulking brutes, they pack a mean punch.)
- Hellfires (Large blazes that fire normal fireballs. Youch!)
- Ghostly Phantom (???. Appears in warped forests.)
- Ender Beast (A large ender beast that periodically spawns in the end.)
- Ender Soul (An accumulation of ender dragon souls flying together. Shoots dragon heads.)
- ??? (???. Related to Ghostly Phantoms.)

SPOILERS ARE BELOW. DO NOT SCROLL FARTHER IF YOU DON'T WANT TO GET SPOILED ABOUT CONTENT.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- Herobrine Phantoms (Ghostly Phantoms) (Appears in warped forests. Killing 20 spawns Herobrine.)
- Herobrine (Boss Mob, is extremely dangerous, but drops useful drops.)

### Herobrine Drops
- Deitic Mending (3x Powerful Mending that is compatible with normal mending.)
- Cursed Power (Increases a fired arrow's damage by +50% + 25% per higher level up to 3. Capped at 100% extra damage.)
- Cursed Sharpness (Increases melee damage by +50% + 25% per higher level up to 3. Capped at 100% extra damage.)
- Block Extractor (Sneak + Mining a block destroys it instantly and lose 0.01% - 0.2% max durability on your item. Mining a block with a block extractor pickaxe extracts the block, giving you whatever it was unless it is not obtainable in vanilla. Includes all blocks. When extracting a block, there is a 1/5 chance of losing your pickaxe. Only appliable on a diamond pickaxe.)
</details>
